'''Jo Ewsli''' was the [[Author/Legends|author]] of ''[[The Anthropology of Engineering]]'' and the designer of the [[I-7 Howlrunner]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. He designed the starfighter after being inspired by the hunting strategies of the [[Howlrunner/Legends|howlrunners]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamar/Legends|Kamar]].<ref name="Vehicles and Vessels" />

{{Char-stub}}
